name: Herb Crusted Lamb Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lamb chops with the whole cumin seeds.
2. Mix in the minced garlic, lemon rind, and lemon juice.
3. Add orange juice to the mixture.
4. Stir in either chopped lemon basil or green basil.
5. Drizzle olive oil over the lamb chops.
6. Ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
